description_long: This skateboard features a vibrant, highly detailed deck with a psychedelic, graffiti-inspired graphic in neon colors, including pink, yellow, green, and blue. The deck is a standard popsicle shape with upturned nose and tail, suitable for street and park skating. The wheels are medium-sized and green, attached to metal trucks that are partially visible beneath the deck. The deck artwork includes bold, swirling patterns, cartoonish creatures, and stylized text, giving it a dynamic and energetic appearance. The surface finish appears slightly glossy, enhancing the vividness of the colors. No visible grip tape or brand logo is present on the top or sides of the deck.
description: A colorful skateboard with neon graffiti-style graphics, green wheels, and a standard popsicle-shaped deck. The deck features bold, swirling artwork and cartoon motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard and the full display of the deck's vibrant, psychedelic artwork.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the skateboard's upturned nose and tail, green wheels, and the full length of the deck's graphic design.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the tail of the skateboard and the continuation of the colorful deck art.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the skateboard's profile, green wheels, and the detailed deck graphics.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a psychedelic, graffiti-style graphic with swirling neon colors, cartoonish creatures, and bold, stylized text. The design is energetic and visually busy, dominated by yellow, pink, green, and blue hues.
attribute_wheel_type: street, medium-sized, solid green, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: Standard street trucks, metallic color, standard kingpin, no visible branding or unique features
